The Empty Man (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $2,995,698Details
International Box Office $973,982
Worldwide Box Office $3,969,680
Further financial details...

Synopsis

On the trail of a missing girl, an ex-cop comes across a secretive group attempting to summon a terrifying supernatural entity.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$1,310,326 (43.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.29 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:75.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,027 opening theaters/2,051 max. theaters, 3.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $3,902,895

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 23rd, 2020 (Wide) by 20th Century Studios
International Releases: August 7th, 2020 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 22nd, 2020 (Wide), released as Empty Man: El mensajero del último día (Mexico)
October 29th, 2020 (Wide) (Australia)
October 29th, 2020 (Wide) (New Zealand)
October 29th, 2020 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: January 12th, 2021 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for violence, disturbing images, language, some sexuality and nudity.
(Rating bulletin 2531 (Cert #50884), 6/13/2018)
Running Time: 137 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prologue
Plot point: Car Accident, Death of a Son or Daughter, Death of a Spouse or Fiancée / Fiancé, Missing Person, Police Detective
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Social setting: Cults, Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Time period setting: 1990s
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: 20th Century Fox, BOOM! Studios
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
